calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Adam Zehring.

Dept.505; Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: K.Valdes: Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:28:02 a.m. and concluding at 9:32:52 a.m.(D505)

Plaintiff Rachelle Hardy appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Adam Zehring not appearing.

Matter was continued from the last hearing for plaintiff to submit and file with the court proof of service evidencing service to defendant.

Plaintiff confirms that proof of service is filed and appears at the register of actions of the case.

Plaintiff provides a summary for the request for judgment.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven their prima facie case and rules in favor of the plaintiff.

Plaintiff to submit to the court in pleading proposed judgment for review and signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Continued To May-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request of default judgment against Defendant Adam Zehring.

Dept:505; Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:05:36 a.m. and concluding at 9:09:27 a.m.(D505)

Plaintiff Rachelle Hardy appeared in pro per.
Defendant Adam Zehring not appearing.

The Court discusses with plaintiff issues with service.

Plaintiff is to notice the defendant of the all the documents filed in the case and file the proof of service with the court.

The Court continues the matter on its own motion allow for Plaintiff to cure the issue. The request for default judgment is continued to May 7, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept.505.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2025 Continued To May-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Continued To Apr-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Mar-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Rachelle Hardy; plaintiff appearing via Zoom.
Somita Basu; 408-850-7250; Norton Basu LLP; appearing via Zoom.

Rachelle Hardy contests the courts tentative ruling. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RACHELLE HARDY AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Counsel to prepare an order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young; Not Reported. (D501)
